jobs.title: Offering Manager
jobs.description:
As a member of the Offering team, you will drive upselling activities across assigned clients. You will act as the key link between the Key Account Manager and delivery teams (Solutions, Projects, Run), ensuring strong proposals, healthy margins, and high customer satisfaction.
Your key tasks
- Contribute to meeting the yearly upselling targets by producing high‑quality, timely offers with a strong win rate (client sign‑off)
- Oversee and follow all elements of the upselling lifecycle, from high‑level estimation to final offering
- Act as a Project Manager, managing time, quality, budget, and approvals for offers, serving as the SPOC for the client, KAM, and all required stakeholders, including third parties
- Support KAMs in establishing productive relationships with managed customers, ensuring customer satisfaction across all aspects related to offerings (services/products, solutions, financials, and time‑to‑market)
- Maintain accurate sales reporting information in company tools (e.g., CRM)

## Qualifiche

- Business School degree or Bachelor in Economics / Business Administration
- 2 years of work experience, ideally in coordination, governance or administrative roles
- Good organizational and coordination skills
- High attention to detail and commitment to quality
- Good communication skills and stakeholder management capability
- Good Knowledge of MS office tools
- Ability to work independently and manage multiple topics in parallel
- A team player who is ready to provide backup and take over from colleagues when needed
- Fluency in English
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Power BI knowledge

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

jobs.title: Head of Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding
jobs.description:
This is a fantastic opportunity for a Head of Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding to join our newly established Service Operations organization at Avaloq.
This role offers significant exposure to a diverse range of clients, including some of the world’s leading financial institutions—an excellent opportunity for individuals looking to advance their career in an exciting and client‑focused environment.
In this role you will carry two core responsibilities. First, you will lead, coordinate and oversee end‑to‑end testing activities, to ensure quality and consistency of Service Operations test campaigns. Then, you will ensure a seamless client onboarding journey by leading the team responsible for Transition & Transformation within Service Operations.
In addition, you will serve as the primary point of contact for the Avaloq Sales organization on Service Operations topics, and support Avaloq’s client community through consultancy engagements.
Your key tasks
Quality Assurance Leadership
- Lead and develop the Service Operations Test and Quality Assurance Managers.
- Partner with Project Delivery, Service Operations and Development teams to design testing strategies, coordinate defect management and ensure cohesive delivery.
- Support the setup of test environments, engaging the appropriate technical teams.
- Ensure successful and comprehensive test campaigns; analyze defect results; provide clear reporting, including quality indicators, to stakeholders.
- Drive continuous improvement and the design of sustainable testing methodologies across customer test campaigns.
Client Onboarding
- Lead the Service Operations Client Onboarding team.
- Establish and maintain effective project structures, governance models and stakeholder management practices.
- Oversee end to end Transition & Transformation project execution for Service Operations.
- Organize and lead consultancy projects for Avaloq clients across on‑premises, SaaS and Banking‑Operations‑as‑a‑Service models for Service Operations.
- Represent Avaloq in client and prospect workshops
Leadership & Team Development
- Provide ongoing guidance, coaching and feedback to team members to foster a culture of learning, growth and continuous improvement.
 

## Qualifiche

- 8+ years of experience in a similar role within the financial industry, ideally in roles involving cross‑functional collaboration and transformation
- Proven leadership skills, including team motivation, performance management, and career development, where you use your exceptional interpersonal skills and communication skills in English (written and verbal) todemonstrate a high level of empathy when engaging with clients and internal stakeholders
- Strong project management and change management experince, with the ability to manage multiple initiatives, prioritize effectively, and deliver results
- University degree or equivalent qualification
- Expertise in test management methodologies, with a track record of driving cross‑functional transformation initiatives
- Technical proficiency in JIRA and strong command of the Microsoft Office Suite
It would be a real bonus if you have:
- Client facing experience
- Project management track record
- Test Automation experience and associated tools
- Good knowledge of Banking services, Application Management Support and Cloud & Infrastructure
- Working experience with Avaloq project/product
- German, Italian and French knowledge is a plus 

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

titleByLocale.it: Responsabile della Garanzia della Qualità e dell'Onboarding dei Clienti
titleByLocale.en: Head of Quality Assurance & Client Onboarding
titleByLocale.fr: Responsable de l’assurance qualité et de l’intégration client

descriptionByLocale.it: Questa è un'opportunità fantastica per un Responsabile della Garanzia della Qualità e dell'Onboarding dei Clienti di entrare nella nostra nuova organizzazione Service Operations presso Avaloq. Questo ruolo offre un'esperienza significativa a una vasta gamma di clienti, inclusi alcuni dei principali istituti finanziari mondiali—un'ottima opportunità per chi desidera far progredire la propria carriera in un ambiente entusiasmante e orientato al cliente. In questo ruolo avrai due responsabilità principali. Per prima cosa, guiderai, coordinerai e supervisionerai le attività di test end-to-end, per garantire qualità e coerenza delle campagne di test delle Operazioni di Servizio. Successivamente, garantirai un percorso di onboarding del cliente senza intoppi guidando il team responsabile della Transizione e Trasformazione all'interno delle Operazioni di Servizio. Inoltre, sarai il punto di contatto principale per l'organizzazione di vendite Avaloq su temi di Service Operations e supporterai la comunità clienti Avaloq attraverso incarichi di consulenza. I tuoi compiti chiave Leadership per la Garanzia della Qualità - Guida e sviluppa i Manager di Test e Assicurazione della Qualità delle Operazioni di Servizio. - Collaborare con i team di Consegna Progetto, Operazioni di Servizio e Sviluppo per progettare strategie di test, coordinare la gestione dei difetti e garantire una consegna coerente. - Supportare l'impostazione degli ambienti di test, coinvolgendo i team tecnici appropriati. - Garantire campagne di test di successo e complete; analizzare i risultati dei difetti; fornire report chiari, inclusi indicatori di qualità, agli stakeholder. - Promuovere il miglioramento continuo e la progettazione di metodologie di test sostenibili nelle campagne di test dei clienti. Onboarding dei clienti - Guida il team di onboarding dei clienti delle operazioni di servizio. - Stabilire e mantenere strutture di progetto efficaci, modelli di governance e pratiche di gestione degli stakeholder. - Supervisionare l'esecuzione end-to-end del progetto di Transizione e Trasformazione per le Operazioni di Servizio. - Organizzare e guidare progetti di consulenza per i clienti Avaloq su modelli on-premises, SaaS e Banking-Operations-as-a-Service per le Service Operations. - Rappresentare Avaloq nei workshop per clienti e potenziali clienti Leadership e Sviluppo di Team - Fornire guida continua, coaching e feedback ai membri del team per favorire una cultura di apprendimento, crescita e miglioramento continuo. ## Qualifiche - 8+ anni di esperienza in un ruolo simile nel settore finanziario, idealmente in ruoli che coinvolgono collaborazione e trasformazione trasversale - Comprovate capacità di leadership, tra cui motivazione di team, gestione delle prestazioni e sviluppo della carriera, dove si utilizzano eccezionali capacità interpersonali e comunicative in inglese (scritto e orale) per dimostrare un alto livello di empatia nel rapporto con clienti e stakeholder interni - Forte gestione dei progetti e Esperienza nella gestione del cambiamento, con capacità di gestire più iniziative, dare priorità efficacemente e ottenere risultati - Laurea universitaria o qualifica equivalente - Competenza in metodologie di gestione dei test, con un curriculum nella guida di iniziative di trasformazione cross-funzionali - Competenza tecnica in JIRA e forte padronanza della suite Microsoft Office Sarebbe un vero vantaggio se avessi: - Esperienza con i clienti - Esperienza nella gestione di progetti - Esperienza in Automazione dei Test e strumenti associati - Buona conoscenza dei servizi bancari, supporto alla gestione delle applicazioni e Cloud & infrastruttura - Esperienza lavorativa con il progetto/prodotto Avaloq - La conoscenza di tedesco, italiano e francese è un vantaggio ## Informazioni aggiuntive Siamo consapevoli che gestire l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata è una sfida che tutti affrontiamo nella vita quotidiana e, per supportarla, siamo lieti di offrire lavoro ibrido e flessibile per la maggior parte dei nostri Avaloqer per mantenere l'equilibrio tra lavoro e vita privata continuare la nostra fantastica cultura Avaloq nei nostri uffici globali. In Avaloq siamo orgogliosi di abbracciare la diversità e comprendere che il successo della nostra azienda si basa sul potere di opinioni diverse, siamo completamente impegnati a promuovere un ambiente di pari opportunità e una cultura inclusiva in cui puoi essere il vero te stesso autentico. Assumiamo, compensiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente da origine, età, identità di genere, orientamento sessuale o qualsiasi altra qualità fantastica che ci renda tutti unici, abbiamo fatto del nostro meglio per scrivere questo annuncio in modo inclusivo e neutrale. Tieni presente che non accetteremo invii speculativi di CV per nessuno dei nostri ruoli da parte di agenzie di reclutamento, e qualsiasi candidato non richiesto sarà esente da qualsiasi aspettativa di pagamento.

descriptionByLocale.de: Dies ist eine fantastische Gelegenheit für einen Leiter Qualitätssicherung und Kundeneinführung, in unsere neu gegründete Service Operations-Organisation bei Avaloq einzusteigen. Diese Rolle bietet bedeutende Kontakte zu einer Vielzahl von Kunden, darunter einige der weltweit führenden Finanzinstitute – eine ausgezeichnete Gelegenheit für Personen, die ihre Karriere in einem spannenden und kundenorientierten Umfeld vorantreiben möchten. In dieser Rolle übernehmen Sie zwei Kernaufgaben. Zunächst führen Sie, koordinieren und überwachen Sie End-to-End-Testaktivitäten, um Qualität und Konsistenz der Service Operations-Testkampagnen sicherzustellen. Anschließend sorgen Sie für eine reibungslose Customer Onboarding-Reise, indem Sie das Team leiten, das für Übergang und Transformation im Service Operations verantwortlich ist. Darüber hinaus fungieren Sie als primärer Ansprechpartner für die Avaloq Sales Organisation zu Service Operations und unterstützen die Kundengemeinschaft von Avaloq durch Beratungsaufträge. Ihre Hauptaufgaben Qualitätssicherungsführung – Leitung und Entwicklung der Service-, Betriebs-, Test- und Qualitätssicherungsmanager. - Partnerschaft mit den Teams Project Delivery, Service Operations und Development zur Gestaltung von Teststrategien, Koordination des Fehlermanagements und zur Sicherstellung einer kohärenten Umsetzung. - Unterstützung beim Aufbau von Testumgebungen und Einbindung der entsprechenden technischen Teams. - Sicherstellen erfolgreicher und umfassender Testkampagnen; Fehlerergebnisse analysieren; Bereitstellen Sie klare Berichte, einschließlich Qualitätsindikatoren, an die Beteiligten. - Kontinuierliche Verbesserung und die Entwicklung nachhaltiger Testmethoden in den Testkampagnen der Kunden vorantreiben. Client Onboarding – Leitung des Service Operations Client Onboarding Team. - Aufbau und Pflege effektiver Projektstrukturen, Governance-Modelle und Stakeholder-Management-Praktiken. - Überwachung der End-to-End-Projektausführung von Übergangs- und Transformationsprojekten für Service Operations. - Organisation und Leitung von Beratungsprojekten für Avaloq-Kunden in den Bereichen On-Premises, SaaS- und Banking-Operations-as-a-Service-Modelle für Service Operations. - Avaloq in Kunden- und Interessentenworkshops vertreten, Führung & Teamentwicklung - Kontinuierliche Anleitung, Coaching und Feedback für Teammitglieder bieten, um eine Kultur des Lernens, Wachstums und kontinuierlichen Verbesserns zu fördern. ## Qualifiche – 8+ Jahre Erfahrung in einer ähnlichen Position in der Finanzbranche, idealerweise in Bereichen mit bereichsübergreifender Zusammenarbeit und Transformation – Nachgewiesene Führungsqualitäten, einschließlich Teammotivation, Leistungsmanagement und Karriereentwicklung, bei denen Sie Ihre außergewöhnlichen zwischenmenschlichen Fähigkeiten und Kommunikationsfähigkeiten auf Englisch (schriftlich und mündlich) nutzen, um ein hohes Maß an Empathie im Umgang mit Kunden und internen Stakeholdern zu zeigen - Starkes Projektmanagement und Erfahrung im Change Management, mit der Fähigkeit, mehrere Initiativen zu managen, effektiv zu priorisieren und Ergebnisse zu liefern – Universitätsabschluss oder gleichwertige Qualifikation – Fachkenntnisse in Testmanagement-Methodiken, mit einer Erfolgsbilanz bei der Umsetzung bereichsübergreifender Transformationsinitiativen – Technische Kompetenz in JIRA und ausgeprägte Beherrschung der Microsoft Office Suite. Es wäre ein echter Vorteil, wenn Sie: - Kundenerfahrung haben - Projektmanagement-Erfolgsbilanz - Testautomatisierungserfahrung und zugehörige Werkzeuge – Gutes Wissen über Bankdienstleistungen, Application Management Support sowie Cloud & Infrastruktur – Berufserfahrung mit Avaloq-Projekten/-Produkten – Deutsch-, Italienisch- und Französischkenntnisse sind ein Pluspunkt ## Informazioni aggiuntive Wir wissen, dass die Balance zwischen Arbeit und Privatleben eine Herausforderung ist, der wir alle im Alltag gegenüberstehen, und um dies zu unterstützen, bieten wir den meisten unserer Avaloqer hybrides und flexibles Arbeiten an, um die Work-Life-Balance zu wahren und dennoch Unsere fantastische Avaloq-Kultur in unseren globalen Büros fortzusetzen. In Avaloq sind wir stolz darauf, Vielfalt zu fördern und zu verstehen, dass der Erfolg unseres Unternehmens auf der Kraft unterschiedlicher Meinungen basiert. Wir setzen uns voll und ganz dafür ein, ein Umfeld für Chancengleichheit und eine inklusive Kultur zu schaffen, in der Sie Ihr wahres authentisches Selbst sein können. Wir stellen ein, vergüten und befördern unabhängig von Herkunft, Alter, Geschlechtsidentität, sexueller Orientierung oder anderen fantastischen Eigenschaften, die uns alle einzigartig machen; wir haben unser Bestes getan, diese Anzeige inklusiv und neutral zu schreiben. Bitte beachten Sie, dass wir keine spekulativen Lebenslaufeinreichungen für unsere Positionen von Personalvermittlungsagenturen akzeptieren und unerwünschte Kandidateneinreichungen von jeglichen Zahlungserwartungen ausgenommen sind.
descriptionByLocale.fr: C’est une opportunité fantastique pour un responsable de l’assurance qualité et de l’intégration client de rejoindre notre organisation des opérations de service nouvellement créée chez Avaloq. Ce poste offre une exposition significative à un large éventail de clients, y compris certains des principaux établissements financiers mondiaux — une excellente opportunité pour les personnes souhaitant faire progresser leur carrière dans un environnement passionnant et centré sur le client. Dans ce rôle, vous aurez deux responsabilités principales. Tout d’abord, vous dirigerez, coordonnez et superviserez les activités de test de bout en bout, afin d’assurer la qualité et la cohérence des campagnes de test des opérations de service. Ensuite, vous garantirez un parcours d’intégration client sans failles en dirigeant l’équipe responsable de la transition et de la transformation au sein des opérations de service. De plus, vous serez le principal point de contact pour l’organisation de vente Avaloq sur les sujets des opérations de service, et soutiendrez la communauté client d’Avaloq via des engagements de conseil. Vos tâches clés : Leadership en assurance qualité - Dirigez et développez les responsables des tests et de l’assurance qualité des opérations de service. - Collaborer avec les équipes de livraison de projet, opérations de service et développement pour concevoir des stratégies de test, coordonner la gestion des défauts et garantir une livraison cohérente. - Soutenir la mise en place des environnements de test, en impliquant les équipes techniques appropriées. - Assurer des campagnes d’essais réussies et complètes ; analyser les résultats des défauts ; Fournir des rapports clairs, y compris des indicateurs de qualité, aux parties prenantes. - Favoriser l’amélioration continue et la conception de méthodologies de test durables à travers les campagnes de test clients. Intégration client - Dirigez l’équipe d’intégration client des opérations de service. - Établir et maintenir des structures de projet efficaces, des modèles de gouvernance et des pratiques de gestion des parties prenantes. - Superviser l’exécution de projets de transition et de transformation de bout en bout pour les opérations de service. - Organiser et diriger des projets de conseil pour les clients Avaloq sur site, SaaS et opérations bancaires en tant que service pour les opérations de service. - Représenter Avaloq lors des ateliers clients et prospects Leadership & Développement d’équipe - Fournir des conseils, du coaching et des retours continus aux membres de l’équipe afin de favoriser une culture d’apprentissage, de croissance et d’amélioration continue. ## Qualifiche - 8+ ans d’expérience dans un rôle similaire dans le secteur financier, idéalement dans des rôles impliquant collaboration et transformation interfonctionnelles - Compétences de leadership avérées, notamment la motivation d’équipe, la gestion de la performance et le développement de carrière, où vous utilisez vos compétences interpersonnelles exceptionnelles et vos compétences en communication en anglais (écrit et oral) pour démontrer un haut niveau d’empathie lors de l’interaction avec les clients et les parties prenantes internes - Gestion de projet solide et Expérience en gestion du changement, avec la capacité de gérer plusieurs initiatives, de prioriser efficacement et de fournir des résultats - Diplôme universitaire ou qualification équivalente - Expertise en méthodologies de gestion des tests, avec un historique de conduite d’initiatives de transformation interfonctionnelles - Maîtrise technique du JIRA et maîtrise solide de la suite Microsoft Office Ce serait un vrai bonus si vous avez : - Expérience en contact avec les clients - Expérience en gestion de projet - Expérience en automatisation des tests et outils associés - Bonne connaissance des services bancaires, du support de gestion d’applications et du Cloud & des infrastructures - Expérience de travail avec le projet/produit Avaloq - Les connaissances en allemand, italien et français sont un atout ## Informations aggiuntive Nous comprenons que gérer l’équilibre vie professionnelle/vie privée est un défi auquel nous sommes tous confrontés au quotidien et, pour y contribuer, nous sommes heureux d’offrir un travail hybride et flexible à la plupart de nos Avaloqers afin de maintenir un équilibre vie professionnelle/vie privée poursuivez notre fantastique culture Avaloq dans nos bureaux mondiaux. Chez Avaloq, nous sommes fiers d’embrasser la diversité et de comprendre que le succès de notre entreprise repose sur la force de différentes opinions ; nous sommes pleinement engagés à favoriser un environnement d’égalité des chances et une culture inclusive où vous pouvez être votre véritable vrai vous-même. Nous embauchons, rémunérons et promouvons indépendamment de l’origine, de l’âge, de l’identité de genre, de l’orientation sexuelle ou de toute autre qualité exceptionnelle qui nous rend uniques, nous avons fait de notre mieux pour rédiger cette publicité de manière inclusive et neutre. Veuillez noter que nous n’accepterons pas les soumissions de CV spéculatifs pour aucun de nos postes provenant d’agences de recrutement, et toute soumission de candidat non sollicitée sera exemptée de toute attente de paiement.

jobs.title: Portfolio Manager & Project Delivery Standards
jobs.description:
Portfolio Management
- Own and oversee the  Project Delivery portfolios for Region Europe , ensuring transparency, consistency, and financial control across all projects

- Manage, review, and challenge the  financial forecasts  for all projects within the regional portfolios, ensuring accuracy and alignment with approved budgets

- Coordinate and drive  regular forecast update cycles , including formal requests and follow-ups with Program managers and KAM

- Prepare and lead  dedicated review meetings  with Program Managers, KAM and Financial Controllers to assess project outlooks, forecast evolution versus budget, and the status of invoices and contracts

- Ensure  alignment between Jira data and financial forecasts , identifying discrepancies and driving corrective actions where required

- Define, prepare, and maintain  regional reporting  for:
- Region Status Meetings with the Delivery Head

- Monthly Delivery and Financial Review meetings with Regional and Delivery Heads and Finance Controlling


- Contribute to the  identification, assessment, and reporting of delivery risks  for Region Europe, providing inputs to the Risk Committee

- Review the  external request process

- Verify the  quality of the PSR  (Project Status Report) content before any  Weekly Project Status Meetings

Delivery Standards 
- Define and maintain Project Delivery standards , including processes, templates, and tooling, to ensure harmonized ways of working across the organization. This includes designing and documenting new processes using  BPMN , leveraging in-depth knowledge of  Avaloq internal processes , and proactively addressing open points by coordinating and aligning with all relevant stakeholders involved in the respective activities

- Update and maintain the  GIM  and  Adonis  in line with newly defined delivery standards

- Lead and manage  company-wide communication  related to new or updated delivery standards, ensuring clarity and adoption across regions and functions

- Actively participate in the  Terminology and Policy Board , contributing to the definition, alignment, and governance of delivery-related terminology and policies

## Qualifiche

Education & Certifications
- Academic Background: Master’s degree in Business Administration, Finance, Engineering Management, or a related field

- Professional Certifications: PMP (Project Management Professional), PfMP (Portfolio Management Professional), or Prince2 Practitioner is highly desirable

- Methodology: Formal training or certification in BPMN 2.0 (Business Process Model and Notation)

Professional Experience
- Portfolio Management: 5–8 years of experience in Project Portfolio Management (PPM) or PMO leadership within a large-scale, international organization

- Financial Acumen: Proven track record in financial controlling, budget management, and project forecasting. You must be comfortable "challenging" financial data and variance reports

- Industry Expertise: In-depth knowledge of Avaloq internal processes is a significant advantage (or mandatory, depending on your priority)

- Stakeholder Management: Extensive experience in coordinating and influencing Senior Management, Program Managers, and Financial Controllers

Technical Skills
- Project Tooling: Advanced proficiency in Jira (including Portfolio/Advanced Roadmaps) and Confluence

- Process Modeling: Hands-on experience with Adonis , Signavio, or similar BPM tools for documenting and maintaining delivery standards

- Data & Reporting: Advanced Excel skills (Power Query, Pivot Tables) and experience with BI tools (e.g., PowerBI, Tableau) to drive regional reporting

- Frameworks: Solid understanding of both Waterfall and Agile delivery methodologies

Soft Skills & Competencies
- Analytical Rigor: Exceptional attention to detail with the ability to reconcile discrepancies between operational data (Jira) and financial forecasts

- Communication Excellence: Ability to articulate complex process changes and delivery standards clearly to diverse audiences across different regions

- Quality Orientation: A "zero-defect" mindset regarding the quality of Project Status Reports (PSR) and documentation

- Languages: Full professional proficiency in English is required. Fluency in German is a strong asset for the European Region

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

jobs.title: Senior Technical Project Manager
jobs.description:
This is a fantastic opportunity to join Avaloq in a Senior Project Manager role, where you will get the opportunity to manage projects within our global CTO organization, supporting the build and roll-out of new product functionalities or components, to our market-leading clients.
As a key member of our Project Delivery organization, you will be responsible for leading and delivering complex projects from inception to completion, ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards.
- Develop and maintain comprehensive project plans (regulatory and/ or innovation projects), including timelines and budgets, communicating with internal stakeholders (kernel development teams), Regional stakeholders, clients, etc.
- Manage Scope, Risks, Issues, and Quality along the entire lifecycle and in alignment with Top Management / C-suite executives
- Develop mitigation strategies to treat risks and resolve issues as they arise
- Effectively communicate and provide weekly project status, progress, and potential roadblocks to Top Management / C-suite executives
- Bridge the gap between product vision and delivery-oriented approach – ensuring deadlines are met according to the project timeline
- Lead cross-divisions / cross-functional project teams to achieve project objectives and milestones
- Oversee project budgets, ensuring Estimate To Complete (ETC) are constantly reviewed according to the project progress
- Conduct post-project evaluations to identify areas for improvement and lessons learned
- Mentor and develop junior project managers and team members

## Qualifiche

- 8-10 years of Project Management experience, with a track record of successfully delivering complex cross-functional projects, at a senior level, within IaaS, PaaS, SaaS and/or BPaaS contexts
- Proven track record of delivering results in a complex international and diverse environment
- Strong knowledge of different project management methodologies (e.g.: Waterfall, Agile, etc.) and software (e.g.: Microsoft Project, Jira, etc.)
- Outstanding communication and presentation abilities, combined with natural ability to manage stakeholders at all levels 
- Demonstrated ability to manage risks and develop effective treatment strategies
- Strong problem-solving and decision-making capabilities
- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment
- Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines
- Strong experience managing end-to end execution of complex programs that span multiple and cross-functional teams through software project lifecycle
- Exceptional leadership and team motivation skills
- Aptitude to discuss technical details with developers and drive consensus among all stakeholders
It would be a significant bonus if you have:
- Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent
- Experience in leading RFI&RFP processes, vendor negotiation, contracting, hiring, and managing third parties
- Relevant exposure to financial services industry 

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.

jobs.title: German Speaking Banking Specialist in Corporate Actions Pre-Processing
jobs.description:
Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.
The Corporate Actions Pre-Processing Team manage events coming from the market affecting the characteristic, the nature, or the value of a security. These events can be mandatory, mandatory with options or voluntary. The activity includes check of incoming messages and ending events, creation of the notification of the Corporate Actions and handling inquiries from clients.
Your key tasks 
- Set up of Mandatory events
- Set up and creation of notifications for Voluntary and Mandatory with choice events
- Check of incoming swift messages
- Handling of enquiries

## Qualifiche

- Economics studies, preferably at university level and with a focus in Finance
- Proactive approach towards a highly challenging, fast-paced and complex environment
- Good communication and organization skills
- Good team player and positive attitude
- Flexibility and willingness to learn
- Fluent in English and German
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Knowledge of Corporate Actions (even if only theoretical)
- Knowledge of Avaloq Core Banking System
- Knowledge of additional languages

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.

jobs.title: Head of P&D Business Management
jobs.description:
We are seeking an experienced, strategic, and highly structured leader to head the Business Management domain within the Product & Development (P&D) business area, specifically within Product Delivery & Quality division.
In this role, you will ensure the P&D organisation operates smoothly, transparently, and in alignment with strategic and financial priorities.
You will lead a domain encompassing Financial Planning, Quarterly Product Planning (or also known as QBR), Reporting, and Communications – while personally driving key strategic, organisational, and leadership initiatives.
This role requires strong business acumen, willingness to drive the change providing input, excellent communication skills, and the ability to partner effectively across senior leadership, technology teams, Controlling, HR, Corporate Communications, Vendor Management, and other business functions.
Your key tasks
- Drive P&D business strategy and ensure alignment across all divisions
- Coordinate organisational design, workforce planning, and leadership offsites
- Own processes around positions approvals, external workforce approvals, data access governance, and support organisational changes
- Oversee financial planning across P&D organisation, including APC, budgeting, forecasting, and TPR/TSR preparation and partner with Controlling to ensure consistent financial governance and reporting in order to support divisional leaders in financial steering
- Own and evolve the PMO service for P&D business area
- Ensure data quality, consistency, and alignment with respect to capacity, demand, and budget
- Act as escalation point for prioritisation and planning conflicts or inconsistencies
- Define, evolve, and prioritise the P&D reporting landscape
- Ensure clear, reliable insights are available for senior leadership decision making
- Own P&D-wide communication strategy, including newsletters, Business Talks, and town-halls
- Ensure P&D newsletters are issued timely, are engaging, and aligned with Corporate Communications
- Lead and coach your team, fostering collaboration, ownership, and continuous improvement
- Define expectations, operating rhythms, and capability development across the Business Management organisation
- Drive a culture of trust, clarity, and operational excellence
 

## Qualifiche

- Proven experience as a leader specifically in business management within a technology company, finance, or PMO in a complex organisation
-  You will exhibit strong financial acumen and experience with budgeting, forecasting, and controlling
- Ability to translate strategy into structure, processes, and measurable outcomes
- Strong track record of working with data, reporting tooling, and KPI frameworks
- Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills at executive level
- Ability to lead through complexity, prioritise across competing demands, and handle sensitive topics with discretion
- Experience of leading and managing a team and developing their performance
- Solid experience in driving meaningful transformation in planning, reporting, communication, and strategy

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self.
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way.
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

jobs.title: Banking Specialist in Payments CH (10-month fixed-term contract)
jobs.description:
Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.

Your key tasks
- Execute the daily activity on payments transactions (order entry, validation and collateral activities) regarding domestic and international commercial payments in line with the standard market rules (swift/sepa/target/sic format, cut-off times, etc)
- Manage the investigation activity towards correspondent banks / ordering banks / beneficiary banks, in strict cooperation with Clients
- Analyze the pending cash open items assigned to Payments Team and take all the necessary steps to close the open positions with correspondent banks
- Cooperate / communicate with clients and counterparties efficiently
- Be involved proactively in the continuous improvement of processes and automation in order to guarantee the best service and client experience

## Qualifiche

- At least 2-3 years of experience in Back Office Payments or similar
- Excellent communication and organization skills
- High flexibility and willingness to learn
- Good team player
- Capability to autonomously get around in a highly challenging, fast-paced and complex environment
- Proficiency in English and German
- It would be a real bonus if you have 

- Knowledge of Avaloq Core Banking System
- Knowledge of Messaging systems: Finastra GMP or IGT+ and Bottomline GTex

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.

jobs.title: Banking Specialist - OTC Derivatives Processing (10-month fixed-term contract)
jobs.description:
Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.
You are applying to the OTC Derivatives Team, within the division of Banking Operations. The team is responsible for the processing and life-cycle management of in-scope products within agreed SLAs and procedures. This includes orders validation, matching of confirmations, cash and position reconciliation with relevant investigations to close open breaks,  listed option transfers and collaboration with the other Banking Operations team to increase efficiency.
Your key tasks
- Timely and accurate processing of OTC Equity and FX derivative products (Accumulators, Decumulators, Swaps, Dual Currency Investment, Structured Investment, FX related products) as well as Interest Rate Swaps, Listed Options and Futures
- Prompt follow-up with relevant parties to resolve any trade exceptions/discrepancies
- Investigating and resolving all outstanding break items (cash and position reconciliations)
- Ensuring that operational delivery covering Derivatives activities is managed within SLAs and KPIs to prevent losses/breaches and mitigate risks
- Escalating any operational risks to Manager for mitigation/solutions
- Supporting Manager in various tasks including process efficiency/improvement and ensuring that information is duly updated in Key Operating Procedure (KOP)
Performing User Acceptance Testing as and when required

## Qualifiche

- Relevant experience in back-office order processing
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
- Proactivity combined with positive attitude and ability to work in a fast-paced environment
- Problem solving and time management skills
- High attention to details, flexibility, and willingness to learn
- Good communicator with ability to build robust relationships with peers and other stakeholders
- Fluency in English and Italian
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Good knowledge of Avaloq system
- Solid technical know-how in the Derivatives areas
- Knowledge of French and German are a plus

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.

Banking Operations is a strategic Avaloq service line providing Banking Operations outsourcing services to banks. We are organized as a global Business Area, running state-of-the art Backoffice services with industry leading automation, quality, and risk standards. We are experts in providing a true value add to our clients and thus, always look to add creative and client-oriented personalities with drive and passion to our team.
You are applying to the OTC Derivatives Team, within the division of Banking Operations. The team is responsible for the processing and life-cycle management of in-scope products within agreed SLAs and procedures. This includes orders validation, matching of confirmations, cash and position reconciliation with relevant investigations to close open breaks,  listed option transfers and collaboration with the other Banking Operations team to increase efficiency.
Your key tasks
- Timely and accurate processing of OTC Equity and FX derivative products (Accumulators, Decumulators, Swaps, Dual Currency Investment, Structured Investment, FX related products) as well as Interest Rate Swaps, Listed Options and Futures
- Prompt follow-up with relevant parties to resolve any trade exceptions/discrepancies
- Investigating and resolving all outstanding break items (cash and position reconciliations)
- Ensuring that operational delivery covering Derivatives activities is managed within SLAs and KPIs to prevent losses/breaches and mitigate risks
- Escalating any operational risks to Manager for mitigation/solutions
- Supporting Manager in various tasks including process efficiency/improvement and ensuring that information is duly updated in Key Operating Procedure (KOP)
Performing User Acceptance Testing as and when required

## Qualifiche

- Relevant experience in back-office order processing
- Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite
- Proactivity combined with positive attitude and ability to work in a fast-paced environment
- Problem solving and time management skills
- High attention to details, flexibility, and willingness to learn
- Good communicator with ability to build robust relationships with peers and other stakeholders
- Fluency in English and Italian
It would be a real bonus if you have
- Good knowledge of Avaloq system

jobs.title: IT Operation Center Specialist
jobs.description:
The Operation Center Specialist is responsible for monitoring and maintaining the health and performance of our IT systems and batch processing jobs.
This role is crucial in ensuring the smooth operation of our IT infrastructure and applications, and the timely execution of critical business processes.
Your key tasks
- System Monitoring: - Proactively monitor system performance and availability metrics
- Identify and troubleshoot system anomalies and performance bottlenecks
- Respond to system alerts and alarms in a timely and efficient manner
- Escalate critical issues to appropriate technical teams

- Batch Processing: - Schedule, monitor, and troubleshoot batch jobs
- Ensure the timely and accurate execution of batch processes
- Investigate and resolve batch job failures

- Incident Management: - Document and track incidents in accordance with established procedures
- Ensure the engagement of all required teams to resolve incidents

Given that our work involves handling data in Switzerland,  we require applicants to be Swiss residents .

## Qualifiche

- Good understanding of IT infrastructure components (servers, networks, databases)
- Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills
- Strong attention to detail
- Ability to work independently and in a team environment
- Strong communication skills, both written and verbal, with a good level of fluency in English
- Full availability to work in shifts, including nights, weekends and public holidays
It would be a real bonus if you have 
- Experience with system monitoring tools (e.g. PagerDuty, NetCool, Grafana)
- Knowledge of batch processing concepts and tools (e.g. Zena)
- Experience with ITIL frameworks
- Knowledge of cloud technologies

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.

jobs.title: HR Projects & Business Management Lead
jobs.description:
This is a fantastic opportunity for a strategic and execution-focused Projects & Business Management Lead to join us and support the Business Area Head for People & Communications and the broader People & Communications function. This role sits at the intersection of strategy, operations, and transformation, ensuring that key initiatives across People, Culture, and Communications are effectively designed, executed, and delivered.
You will act as a strategic partner and program leader, translating priorities into structured programs, driving cross-functional initiatives, and ensuring strong governance, reporting, and follow-through. A key focus of the role will be supporting the development of a modern, data-informed, and business-oriented People & Communications function, helping shape how the function operates, delivers value, and partners with the business.
This role is ideal for someone who combines strategic thinking with hands-on project execution and enjoys working in a fast-moving, highly collaborative environment.
Program Management
- Lead and manage strategic initiatives across People, Culture, Communications and Location Management.
- Translate functional strategy into structured programs, roadmaps, and execution plans.
- Coordinate cross-functional projects involving HR, Communications, Leadership, and other business teams.
- Track milestones, risks, budgets, and deliverables to ensure successful execution.
Building a Modern People & Communications Function
- Support the design and implementation of a modern, future-oriented People & Communications function working together with the Divisions
- Help define operating models, governance, and ways of working that enable strong business partnerships and impactful delivery.
- Contribute and/or drive initiatives related to employee experience, data-insight and digital HR, process improvement and Communications
- Identify opportunities to improve processes, increase impact, and leverage data and technology in decision-making.
- Contribute to strengthening the function’s role as a strategic partner to the business and a people advocate
Business Management & Operational Excellence
- Support the annual planning cycle for the BA, including strategic priorities, OKRs, and budgeting.
- Monitor performance and progress of key initiatives through dashboards and reporting.
- Ensure operational alignment and prioritization across the People & Communications organization.
- Improve processes, governance, and ways of working within the function.
Executive Support
- Prepare high-quality briefing materials, analysis, and presentations for executive leadership.
- Connects within the People & Communications functions as well as with our people across Avaloq to provide insights on trends, people engagement, culture, and communication effectiveness.
- Conduct research and benchmarking on best practices in people and communications strategy and organizational transformation.
- Support the preparation of materials for executive committees and board discussions.
Change & Transformation
- Drive the planning and follows implementation of major people and culture initiatives.
- Coordinate change management and communication strategies to ensure successful adoption.
- Monitor impact and progress of transformation programs.
Governance & Stakeholder Coordination
- Establish governance frameworks for major initiatives.
- Organize and support leadership forums, steering committees, and project boards.
- Ensure alignment across HR, Communications, and other business functions.
- Track decisions, actions, and accountability across strategic programs.

## Qualifiche

- Strong track record of experience in strategy, consulting, program management, HR, or business operations.
- Experience leading complex cross-functional projects or transformation initiatives.
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with the ability to translate strategy into action.
- Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills with experience preparing executive-level presentations and reports.
- Highly organized with strong project management capabilities with the ability to navigate ambiguity and drive progress in a dynamic environment.
It would be a real bonus if you have:
- Experience in management consulting, corporate strategy, or people strategy/HR transformation.
- Familiarity with people analytics, organizational design, digital HR tools, or culture initiatives.
- Experience working with senior executives or leadership teams.

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices.

jobs.title: Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert - FiRE
jobs.description:
This role combines Swiss prudential regulation expertise with hands‑on ownership of the FiRE legal reporting platform and business analysis skills to translate regulation into technical requirements. 


As a Swiss Regulatory Reporting Expert, you will be responsible for ensuring full and timely compliance with Swiss and Liechtenstein regulatory reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, FMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures, etc.) through the effective use, configuration, and enhancement of the FiRE reporting tool.

Your key tasks
- Own the end‑to‑end regulatory reporting process in FiRE for SNB statistics, Basel IV capital, liquidity ratios, large exposures, market and country risk, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and timely submission to the competent authorities
- Interpret regulatory texts (FINMA circulars, SNB guidelines, Basel standards) and translate them into clear business rules, data mappings, and technical specifications for implementation in FiRE and upstream systems
- Monitor regulatory developments affecting Swiss and cross‑border reporting and assess their impact on existing FiRE configurations, reporting logic, and data requirements; drive or coordinate corresponding change initiatives
       FiRE ownership and technical duties
- Configure and maintain FiRE (interfaces and client configuration), in close cooperation with IT and the software provider, to reflect current legal requirements and bank‑specific needs
- Define, document, and prioritise detailed functional and technical requirements for changes to FiRE and upstream data sources, based on regulatory interpretation and operational constraints
- Perform and coordinate functional testing (SIT/UAT) for new FiRE releases and regulatory changes, including non‑regression tests, reconciliation checks, and defect management until production sign‑off
       Governance, controls and stakeholders
- Design and operate data quality and control frameworks around FiRE (validation checks, reconciliations with general ledger and risk systems, sign‑off workflows), and document procedures in line with internal policies and audit expectations
- Act as primary point of contact for internal stakeholders (Finance, Risk, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legal) on Swiss regulatory reporting topics and for external stakeholders (FINMA, SNB, auditors) regarding FiRE‑generated reports

## Qualifiche

- University degree in Finance, Economics, Law, or a related field, with 3–5+ years of experience in banking regulatory reporting or prudential regulation, ideally in the Swiss market
- In‑depth knowledge of Swiss prudential and statistical reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures), and proven ability to interpret and operationalise regulatory texts
- Hands‑on experience with regulatory reporting tools, preferably FiRE (or similar solutions), including configuration, data mapping, and testing; strong understanding of banking products (loans, securities, derivatives, off‑balance‑sheet items)
- Strong analytical and conceptual skills, with high attention to detail and data quality, and the ability to challenge inconsistencies across systems and reports
- Excellent communication skills, capable of drafting clear technical specifications and documentation and of bridging regulatory, business, and IT perspectives
- Team‑oriented, proactive, and autonomous working style, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines
- Fluency in English plus German or French is preferred for roles in the Swiss banking sector

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

- Design and operate data quality and control frameworks around FiRE (validation checks, reconciliations with general ledger and risk systems, sign‑off workflows), and document procedures in line with internal policies and audit expectations
- Act as primary point of contact for internal stakeholders (Finance, Risk, IT, Front Office, Compliance, Legal) on Swiss regulatory reporting topics and for external stakeholders (FINMA, SNB, auditors) regarding FiRE‑generated reports

## Qualifiche

- University degree in Finance, Economics, Law, or a related field, with 3–5+ years of experience in banking regulatory reporting or prudential regulation, ideally in the Swiss market
- In‑depth knowledge of Swiss prudential and statistical reporting requirements (SNB, FINMA, Basel IV, liquidity, large exposures), and proven ability to interpret and operationalise regulatory texts
- Hands‑on experience with regulatory reporting tools, preferably FiRE (or similar solutions), including configuration, data mapping, and testing; strong understanding of banking products (loans, securities, derivatives, off‑balance‑sheet items)
- Strong analytical and conceptual skills, with high attention to detail and data quality, and the ability to challenge inconsistencies across systems and reports
- Excellent communication skills, capable of drafting clear technical specifications and documentation and of bridging regulatory, business, and IT perspectives
- Team‑oriented, proactive, and autonomous working style, with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines
- Fluency in English plus German or French is preferred for roles in the Swiss banking sector

## Informazioni aggiuntive

We realize that managing work life balance is a challenge we all face in our daily lives and in order to support with this we are pleased to offer hybrid and flexible working for most of our Avaloqers to maintain work life balance and still continue our fantastic Avaloq culture in our global offices. 
In Avaloq we are proud to embrace diversity and understand the success of our business is built on the power of different opinions, we are whole heartedly committed to fostering an equal opportunity environment and inclusive culture where you can be your true authentic self. 
We hire, compensate and promote regardless of origin, age, gender identity, sexual orientation or any other fantastic traits that make us all unique, we have done our best to write this advert in an inclusive and neutral way. 
Please be aware that we will not accept speculative CV submissions for any of our roles from recruitment agencies, and any unsolicited candidate submissions will be exempt from any payment expectations.

jobs.title: Apprendista di commercio AFC con Maturità
jobs.description:
Apprendista di commercio AFC
A partire da metà agosto 2026 siamo alla ricerca di un/a apprendista di commercio AFC presso la nostra sede a Bioggio.
Durante i tre anni di apprendistato, ti offriamo la possibilità di imparare diversi compiti in ambito amministrativo all’interno di un’azienda leader del mercato svizzero per le soluzioni software bancario integrato.
Inoltre, trascorrerai 2 giorni alla settimana presso la scuola di apprendistato commerciale e parteciperai di tanto in tanto a corsi interaziendali, dove potrai acquisire ulteriori conoscenze e competenze.
 
Principali compiti e responsabilità:
- Fornire supporto amministrativo in varie aree, tra cui contabilità, risorse umane e facility management
- Consulenza a clienti, fornitori e dipendenti al telefono o via e-mail
- Organizzazione e coordinamento di riunioni ed eventi per vari team
- Creazione ed elaborazione di documenti e presentazioni
- Elaborazione e riconciliazione di fatture e pagamenti
In ogni reparto avrai un referente che si occuperà di te e sarà pronto ad aiutarti per qualsiasi domanda e a darti consigli.
Se ti piace lavorare in gruppo e al computer, ti piace il contatto con le persone, sei affidabile e indipendente, allora l'apprendistato commerciale in Avaloq è la strada giusta per te.
Sei pronto per il tuo futuro in Avaloq?

## Qualifiche

Requisiti necessari:
- Buon rendimento scolastico
- Spiccato interesse per le tematiche economiche
- Adattabilità, motivazione e indipendenza e un forte senso di responsabilità
- Buone doti organizzative e propensione al lavoro in team
- Attenzione ai dettagli e precisione
- Italiano fluente / madrelingua, conoscenza dell'inglese
- Domicilio in Svizzera
- Iscrizione alla scuola di commercio

## Informazioni aggiuntive

In Avaloq abbracciamo la diversità e la differenza. Ci impegniamo con tutto il cuore per le pari opportunità di impiego e promuoviamo una cultura inclusiva in cui i contributi di tutti sono valorizzati e le loro voci ascoltate. Assumiamo, retribuiamo e promuoviamo indipendentemente dall'origine, dall'età, dall'orientamento sessuale, dall'identità di genere o da qualsiasi altra affascinante caratteristica che ci rende diversi. Si prega di notare che le nostre descrizioni delle mansioni sono scritte in un linguaggio inclusivo e neutro rispetto al genere.
Accettiamo esclusivamente candidature online, preferibilmente con documenti in formato pdf, in italiano o in inglese. Oltre al CV, si prega di allegare alla domanda tutti i certificati della scuola secondaria e una lettera di motivazione.
